episodes.title: Vigil for Virginia Giuffre, abuse survivors held on National Mall | NBC4 Washington
episodes.description:
Supporters of Virginia Giuffre showed up for a daylight candlelight butterfly vigil on the National Mall to honor those impacted by gender-based violence. News4’s Dominique Moody reports.
